6a2b2d6fce04bf77dbda0df2 description: Secret experiment number C416, developed by TerraGroup Labs. The purpose of the experiment was to create intelligent beings that could think as well as humans. The experiment used the genes of a cat and a random wild animal. However, something went wrong, and C416 turned out to be much smarter than they had anticipated. As a result, C416 escaped and now lives in the customs area, selling junk to make a living.
